narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-APT-GEN has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1199, T1203, T1547, T1059. Average risk score: 8.9/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1203, Valid Accounts, Exploit Public-Facing Application, Phishing, Spearphishing Link. Average risk score: 8.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CVE-GEN has been observed in 24 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-13364, CVE-2026-40466, CVE-2026-41044, CVE-2026-3565, CVE-2026-25654. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547.001, T1199, T1203, Pre-OS Boot, Data from Information Repositories. Average risk score: 8.4/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-PHI-GEN has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1199, T1203, T1213, T1566. Average risk score: 8.4/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 6 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-60710, CVE-2021-22681, CVE-2025-70994, CVE-2025-65856, CVE-2026-3893. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: Pre-OS Boot: Firmware Corruption, Valid Accounts, Exploit Public-Facing Application, Credentials from Password Stores, Phishing. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 8.3/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-MOB-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547.001, Registry Run Keys, T1203, T1078.001, T1547. Average risk score: 8.2/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-32201. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: Valid Accounts, Acquire Infrastructure: Domains, Phishing, Spearphishing Link, Exploitation for Client Execution. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 8.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-55182. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: Valid Accounts, Exploit Public-Facing Application, Credentials from Password Stores, Exploitation for Client Execution, Command and Scripting Interpreter. Average risk score: 8.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

detections.recommendation: Deploy AI-aware email filtering. Train users on AI-generated phishing characteristics.
Implement media verification protocols. Require multi-factor authentication for sensitive actions.
Strengthen identity verification procedures. Deploy voice/communication authentication.

recommendations: Mitigate credential theft risk: credential harvest, password spray
Mitigate session hijack risk: token theft, replay attack
Mitigate privilege escalation risk: privilege escalation, sudo, root access
Mitigate identity fraud risk: impersonation, account takeover
Mitigate auth bypass risk: authentication bypass, auth bypass

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE - quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto - quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
